summary: Vertical video. A narrated USCIS PSA ('Who should register?') stating U.S. law requires all aliens to register and explaining the 14-and-older and 30-day criteria under Trump's EO 14159. It uses stock B-roll (laptop typing, a DHS flag, a fingerprint, a classroom) under a voiceover with white caption text and an ARR logo and URL end card. On-screen and spoken text includes 'all aliens to register', 'is making sure aliens comply', 'when you applied for a U.S. visa', 'they register too', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: all aliens to register; is making sure aliens comply; when you applied for a U.S. visa; they register too; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
